description: The 'legacy-logging-system' project uses a deprecated static logger that needs to be migrated to a new Fluent API style. Refactor `LogService.java` to replace all occurrences of `LegacyLogger.log(message, level, timestamp)` with the new pattern: `FluentLogger.at(level).withTime(timestamp).log(message)`. Note that the arguments are reordered: `level` moves to the start (`.at()`), `timestamp` moves to the middle (`.withTime()`), and `message` moves to the end (`.log()`). The project must compile successfully after refactoring.
